meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Debugging Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Learn how to integrate Git with AI to debug faster, maintain clean history, and deliver high-quality code for your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting bugs manually. By integrating AI-driven Git workflows, you transform your repository into a conversational context engine. Use Claude Code to analyze diffs and Antigravity to map dependency graphs, turning 'can't debug' moments into systematic, automated resolutions that save hours of billable time per project.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is looming, and your codebase has turned into a labyrinth of 'undefined' errors. You’ve been staring at the same block of logic for three hours, and the stack trace is effectively speaking a foreign language. This is the freelancer's purgatory: the inability to debug effectively while your reputation hangs in the balance.

But what if your repository could talk back? By leveraging the synergy between Git’s historical data and AI’s pattern recognition, you can bypass manual trial-and-error. We are shifting from 'guessing the fix' to 'architecting the solution' using modern AI-assisted CLI tools that turn your terminal into a senior-level pair programmer.

steps.title: Contextualizing the Bug via Git History
steps.description: Before fixing, you must understand the evolution of the bug. Use AI to inspect the last 5 commits to identify when the regression was introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the git log for the last 5 commits in this directory. Identify potential regressions related to the current authentication module failure.

steps.title: Isolating the Faulty Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a semantic search across your codebase to find where the specific variable causing the crash is referenced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan all files in /src for the definition and usage of the 'userSession' object. Flag any non-standard mutations.

steps.title: Simulating the Fix
steps.description: Don't commit yet. Generate a patch and test the hypothesis in an isolated environment using AI-driven dry runs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a robust fix for the null pointer exception in auth.ts. Ensure the solution adheres to existing architectural patterns.

steps.title: Executing the Automated Refactor
steps.description: Apply the verified fix across multiple files while maintaining strict version control integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the previously discussed fix to auth.ts and userController.ts. Update the tests to reflect the new null-handling logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply --commit 'fix: resolve race condition in auth flow'

steps.title: Verifying Regression Coverage
steps.description: Final check to ensure the fix hasn't broken other parts of the system by cross-referencing against the full test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and explain any remaining failure patterns in relation to the recent changes.

pro_tips: Always commit your 'debug state' to a temporary branch so you can diff your failed attempts against the final solution.
Use Claude Code's --chat-history flag to keep a running log of your debugging logic for client-facing technical reports.
Treat your error logs as data; pipe them directly into your AI prompt rather than copying and pasting manually.
Configure Antigravity to ignore node_modules and build artifacts to speed up index time and reduce token noise.
When a bug is complex, ask the AI to generate a sequence diagram of the data flow before attempting a code change.
resources: Git Best Practices for AI Workflows: https://git-scm.com/doc
content.next_steps: Integrate these CLI tools into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the first pass of debugging whenever a build fails.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting billable hours on manual debugging and start delivering production-grade code at double the speed. The future of freelancing is AI-augmented, and you’re just getting started. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
